verification_gate: Red tests fail first for: Durable mounts re-attached; Paths match T3/T4; Ownership correct; green only when all pass with a recorded proof record.

gate_result.reattach_evidence: reattachDurablePlane() verifies each durable root live: meta/var/lib present, the PostgreSQL/RuVector datadir present, xdg-data present and writable (probe write executed and removed).
gate_result.path_evidence: The rebound roots are exactly the tier map's durable targets (meta/var/lib/postgresql prefix asserted against isolation_tier_map.json).
gate_result.ownership_evidence: Every durable root is owned by the LifeOS user (uid match asserted).
gate_result.product_execution_evidence: Real filesystem verification including a live write probe on the durable plane.
gate_result.red_first: gates committed red with the re-attach engine and unit absent (4/4 files failing), green at HEAD (lane 12/12)

proof_summary: ARCHBP-095 is complete: the durable plane rebinds so services find their data — the meta/var lib tier, the PostgreSQL/RuVector datadir, and the writable xdg-data root all re-attach with correct ownership at exactly the T3/T4 tier-map paths.
